constraints.description: Must attend monthly board meetings on the last Thursday of each month.
All external communications must go through official hospital channels.
Cannot make unilateral decisions above $50K without committee sign-off.

notes: Senior hospital administrator reporting directly to the hospital CEO. High public visibility role.

constraints.description: Mother requires medication administration at 8am and 8pm daily and this cannot be delegated without a qualified substitute arranged in advance.
Cannot travel overnight without confirming a qualified caregiver replacement.
No back-to-back travel days exceeding 3 consecutive nights away.

notes: Mother has early-stage dementia and routine disruption causes significant distress. Diana is the sole family caregiver in the city.

constraints.description: Must attend weekly therapy session on Wednesday mornings 8-9am as a non-negotiable standing appointment.
No scheduling of high-stakes meetings or travel during the Wednesday 8-9am therapy window.

notes: Actively managing caregiver burnout. Therapy is non-negotiable self-preservation, not optional wellness.
